detail.description:
Decision to approve the content of the G1 electronic game script No. 2201/QD-BTTTT issued on November 10, 2023

[Introduction]
With a long-standing brand and unquestionable quality, Football Master 2 is the most realistic and groundbreaking football management game today. Built on an extremely high-quality 3D graphics platform. Create your own team from scratch, train your players to become superstars and compete with other managers in different tournaments around the world. This great game is r
